subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Though the Sun of Truth hath been obscured behind the clouds of glory; though these clouds have interposed themselves as veils
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی هر چند شمس حقیقت در خلف سحاب جلال متواری گشت و سحاب نقاب شد و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort
